title: My Old Dutch
writer: Arthur Shirley, Albert Chevalier, Laurence Trimble
actors: May McAvoy, Pat O'Malley, Cullen Landis
plot: Sal Gratton picks Joe Brown over Bill Sproat for her husband. They marry and have a son, and Sproat watches them in anger over the passing years. Sal and Joe come into a fortune and they give their son all the advantages in life, ...
